solar_flare.issue: A blinding radiation wave is approaching your ship from a nearby star!

space_pirates.issue: A rogue cruiser demands 10 units of fuel!

asteroid_belt.issue: Your ship comes across an asteroid belt.

2.text: Throw out the worst, but use what you can

planet_encounter.issue: You come accross a new planet.

1.text: Spend a day scavenging and studying

derelict_encounter.issue: You come accross a derilict ship.

1.text: Say a prayer and fly by

air_leak.issue: The hull gets a small breach and starts leaking air.

1.text: Get the Engineer to fix it up good (requires Engineer)

2.text: Throw some duct tape over it

fuel_leak.issue: Your control panel indicates a fuel leak

1.text: Space Walk and fix the fuel lines (requires Engineer or Spare Parts)

2.text: Set the computer to auto-fix the line

broken_bone.issue: A crew member broke a bone during physical training

1.text: Set the bone as best as you can.

2.text: Send the crew member to the Medic (requires Medic)

1.text: Fiddle with it and hopefully get it working

2.text: Get the Engineer to fix it up good (requires Engineer)

unknown_creature.issue: You encounter a strange creature in interstellar space

speed_push.issue: The engine team says you can attempt a hard burn.

1.text: Tell them to 'Punch it' and buckle in

warp_gate.issue: You have stumbled upon an ancient Warp Gate

1.text: Power it and attempt to pass through

2.text: Pass by, marking the location for later
